attacking_style: Exploits psychological moments when chasers relax, preferring descent attacks immediately after categorized climbs rather than conventional summit or finale sprint attacks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team setup patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Technical descents following categorized climbs where timing and positioning advantage can be converted into solo efforts; capable of sustaining efforts for 1+ minute gaps.
vulnerability: Unknown from available data - single observation shows strength in opportunistic racing but no repeated exposure patterns.
key_patterns: Attacks on descents rather than climbs when breakaway dynamics present opportunity.
Reads psychological moments when chase groups relax post-effort to launch winning moves.
Capable of converting late-race attacks into substantial time gaps (1+ minute solo).
form_trajectory: unknown: single 2021 Tour de France stage win shows opportunistic strength but insufficient timeline data
